rationale: Both reviews identify the identical three scope violations (bundled AffineAlgGroup class at line 35/34; premature naive IsUnipotent on GroupLike at 49/48; True-stub ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup at 65/60), all directly visible in the diff and matching the shared roadmap objections. Acting on either therefore produces the exact same outcome (PR drops the file or moves it post-Layer 5).
